sql.query: SELECT s.id,s.templateId,s.stageName,s.description,s.sortOrder,s.status,s.colour,s.requiresAllTasksComplete,CAST(COUNT(t.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS taskCount FROM tbl_template_stages s INNER JOIN tbl_workflow_templates wt ON wt.id=s.templateId AND wt.tenantId=s.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_template_tasks t ON t.templateStageId=s.id AND t.tenantId=s.tenantId AND t.status<>'archived' WHERE s.templateId=:templateId AND s.tenantId=:tenantId GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.sortOrder,s.id
